request: Get the VIP Lake Travis landing concept to ship — fix what you can, ask only what you must.
inputsFingerprint: 3 desktop frames (Desktop 1440 + 2 unnamed); lineup 3-boat vs 2-boat; no mobile frame

evidence.statement: Same three desktop frames as the prior run, unchanged (fingerprint match), inspected this session.
The prior blockers persist: no mobile frame, 3-boat vs 2-boat lineup conflict, placeholder testimonials, two unnamed frames.
The agent cannot edit the Figma file directly, so fixes are delivered as ready-to-apply specs and copy rather than committed to the file.

decisionsNeeded: Boat lineup + pricing: 2-boat (Berkshire Tritoon $435 / Sea-Doo GTI 130 $330) or 3-boat (Tritoon $435 / Pontoon $335 / Sea-Doo $330)?
Is mobile in scope this round, or desktop-only?
Real testimonials/logos available, or approve clearly-labeled placeholders?

pathToShip.item: Deliver 3 real-sounding testimonial copy options (labeled as drafts) to drop in
Write the mobile layout spec from the chosen desktop frame, ready to build
pathToShip.unlocks: removes the mobile-build unknown once a frame is chosen

pathToShip.item: Pick one canonical desktop frame and name it; drop the two duplicates
Confirm the boat lineup and pricing
Confirm whether mobile is in scope this round
pathToShip.unlocks: if in scope, agent's mobile spec becomes a build task

scorecard.evidence: Visibly native; layer structure not opened
Frames render cleanly at desktop dimensions
Navy/coral/aqua on lake imagery; consistent 15% hook
Open locally; client share link not verified
Two of three frames unnamed; no final designated

verdict.reason: Unchanged since the last run, so the board was not re-run. Three decisions gate ship; the rest is fixable.
verdict.assumption: mobile is in scope this round
verdict.requiredProof: One named final desktop frame, confirmed lineup + pricing, and (if in scope) a mobile frame.
verdict.nextAction: Answer the 3 decisions. Then it is one build pass to ship with changes, and ship on client approval of lineup + pricing.
